metadata.description: Browse Claude Code and Codex skill bundles for CI/CD, software design, docs, and web dev. Install from GitHub in one command.

plugins.name: shared-skills

plugins.name: ci-cd
plugins.description: Claude Code and Codex skills focused on CI/CD pipelines, release flows, and delivery automation.

plugins.name: doc-skills

plugins.name: web-design-skills
